creator: yamayan@wind.sannet.ne.jp
text:
geli version check accept ONLY newest metadata.
older geli disk cannot attach.

Fix: geli version check in g_eli_config(sys/geom/eli/g_eli_ctl.c)
  accept older version as same as g_eli_taste(g_eli.c).


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: older version geli init disk without -b option.
newest version geli attach disk.
